About Bud's Collectibles

The Vendor Behind
the Table

A collector first, vendor second. Bud's Collectibles is built on fair deals, honest communication, and a genuine love for the hobby.

Our Story Vendor Setup What We Bring Reviews FAQ
🎪 — Shows Attended
📦 — Items Listed
🤝 100% Positive Feedback
⚡ 5+ TCGs Carried
💰 Fair Market Pricing
The Origin Story

Collector First,
Vendor Always

It started the way it always does — a single card that sparked something. For Bud, the hobby wasn't just about collecting. It was about the hunt: flipping through binders at shows, trading with strangers who became friends, learning what made a card valuable beyond its market price.

After years of buying and trading at card shows across Chicagoland, the natural next step was to get behind the table instead of just browsing it. Bud's Collectibles launched with a simple promise: every transaction would be honest, every price would be fair, and every customer would be treated like a fellow collector — because that's exactly what Bud is.

Today, Bud's Collectibles operates across multiple card shows throughout the year, carrying everything from high-value graded slabs to budget singles for new collectors just getting started. The mission hasn't changed: make the hobby more accessible and more trustworthy for everyone.

See How We Do Business →
B
Bud
Owner · Collector · Vendor
Aurora, IL · Chicagoland
Pokémon Magic Yu-Gi-Oh! Lorcana One Piece
Lifelong collector. Passionate about fair trades, community building, and getting the right card into the right hands.
Why We Do This

Mission & Vision

🎯

The Mission

To be the most trustworthy trading card vendor at every show we attend. That means fair pricing, honest grading assessments, transparent buying offers, and treating every customer — whether they're spending $5 or $500 — with the same level of respect and attention.

🔭

Long-Term Goals

  • Expand to 20+ shows per year across the greater Midwest
  • Build a fully searchable online inventory updated weekly
  • Host community trade nights in the Chicagoland area
  • Establish a referral network with other trusted local vendors
  • Build a strong collector community on social media and at local shows
❤️

Community Involvement

Bud's Collectibles believes the hobby is only as strong as its community. We actively support newer collectors with fair pricing on starter singles, participate in local charity pack-opening events, and stay active on social media and at shows where collectors can connect, share pulls, and find trading partners.

At the Show

Vendor Setup

Here's what to expect when you find Bud's Collectibles at a show.

🏷️

Clearly Priced

Every card is priced and labeled. No guessing, no "make an offer first." Price tags show condition and are based on current PriceCharting market values (TCGPlayer & eBay recently sold data).

🗂️

Organized by Game

Singles are sorted by game, then set, then alphabetically. Sealed product is displayed prominently. Graded slabs have their own dedicated section.

💳

Multiple Payment Options

Cash preferred. Venmo, Zelle, PayPal G&S, and Square card reader all accepted. No extra fees on any payment method.

🔍

Loupe Available

Want a closer look? A loupe and UV light are always on the table. Inspect anything you're considering — no pressure.

🤝

Trade Friendly

Bring your trade binder. Bud actively looks to make trades work. PriceCharting market values (TCGPlayer & eBay recently sold data) used for both sides — always transparent.

📱

QR Code at Table

A QR code at the table links to this site's show hub with all inventory, social links, and contact info — perfect for browsing after the show.

Inventory at Shows

What We Bring

Inventory varies by show size, but here's a general breakdown of what to expect at the table.

⚡

Pokémon TCG

Primary
  • Modern singles (Scarlet & Violet era)
  • Classic era reprints and vintage cards
  • Full Art, Alt Art, Secret Rare chase cards
  • Sealed booster boxes and Elite Trainer Boxes
  • PSA/BGS graded Charizards and key cards
  • Budget commons and uncommons for new players
🔮

Magic: The Gathering

Featured
  • Commander staples across all price ranges
  • Reserved List cards (selection varies)
  • Modern and Legacy playables
  • Draft and Set boosters
  • Foil and showcase alt-art treatments
  • Bulk commons/uncommons by request
✨

Disney Lorcana

Featured
  • Enchanted rares (high demand)
  • Foil singles across all chapters
  • Sealed product and starter decks
  • Full Art and alt-art treatments
🐉

Yu-Gi-Oh!

Available
  • Meta competitive singles
  • Vintage 1st edition cards
  • Blue-Eyes, Dark Magician collectibles
  • Structure deck components
☠️

One Piece TCG

Growing
  • English set singles (Romance Dawn onward)
  • Alternate art leaders and rares
  • Sealed product when available

The Difference

Why Collectors Choose
Bud's Collectibles

🎯

Fair Market Pricing

Prices are based on current PriceCharting market values (TCGPlayer & eBay recently sold data) — not inflated show premiums. OBO items are genuinely negotiable.

🔍

Honest Grading

Condition descriptions are accurate. If a card has a flaw, it's disclosed — not hidden under a sleeve.

💬

Open Communication

Questions are always welcome. Whether you're a veteran collector or buying your first card, you get the same respect and honest answers.

🔄

Trade Positive

Trades are encouraged. Bud would rather you walk away with cards you love than cash you'll immediately spend elsewhere.

📦

Bulk Buying

Collections of all sizes welcome. No minimum, no lowballing, and payment is made same-day — no waiting for checks.

🤝

Community First

This is a hobby, not just a business. Every sale, trade, and conversation is approached with that in mind.

Common Questions

Vendor FAQ
